case_title: BENJAMIN EDWARD EVEN VS. GEORGE PAVLOV

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,480.26 FILED BY EVEN, BENJAMIN EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT PAVLOV, GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND". (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVEN, BENJAMIN EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT PAVLOV, GEORGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-06-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVEN, BENJAMIN EDWARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PAVLOV, GEORGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
